title: Software Developer Intern
description:
Job Title: 1099 Software Developer Intern (Zoho Creator Platform)
Company: Clean Community Inc.
Location: Remote
Compensation: $15-18/hour (1099 Contractor)
Trial Period: 2-week performance-based evaluation
About Us
Clean Community Inc. is a growing, solutions-driven company focused on building practical tools that solve real-world problems. We operate lean, move fast, and value individuals who take ownership of their work.
Position Overview
We are seeking a motivated and disciplined Software Developer Intern to support development on the Zoho Creator platform. This is a 1099 contractor role designed for individuals who are serious about building, delivering, and growing their technical skill set in a real-world environment.
This is not a passive internship. You will be expected to contribute, deliver, and communicate like a professional.
Performance-Based Trial (First 2 Weeks)
All candidates will begin with a 2-week evaluation period(s).
During this time, you must:
Demonstrate the ability to write clean, functional code
Complete assigned tasks within agreed timelines
Communicate progress clearly and consistently
Continuation beyond this period is based on performance, reliability, and delivery.
Responsibilities
Develop and customize applications within Zoho Creator
Write and maintain code using HTML, CSS, and either C++ or Java
Work with databases to manage, retrieve, and structure data
Execute tasks based on defined Statements of Work (SOW)
Deliver assigned features and fixes on time and within scope
Collaborate on improving system functionality and performance
Requirements
Working knowledge of:
HTML
CSS
C++ or Java
Database fundamentals (SQL or equivalent)
Strong problem-solving skills
Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
Clear communication and accountability
Willingness to learn Zoho Creator (if not already experienced)
Work Structure
All work is assigned based on project-specific SOWs
Each project has a defined scope, timeline, and budget
Compensation is tied to hours worked and deliverables completed
What We’re Looking For
We are looking for someone who:
Takes initiative without needing constant oversight
Values execution over excuses
Is serious about building real-world experience
Can move quickly while maintaining quality
How to Apply
Please submit:
A brief introduction
Examples of past work or projects (if available)
Your availability
Final Note
This role is ideal for someone who wants hands-on experience and real responsibility. If you are looking to grow, build, and prove your capabilities, we want to hear from you.
